name: Rich Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan; chill.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese with an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
4. Gradually add sugar, mixing well after each addition.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Stir in sour cream, melted chocolate, cocoa powder, and vanilla; mix well.
7. Gently fold in whipped cream; pour into the prepared pan.
8. Bake in an oven set to 300°F for 1 hour.
9. Turn off the oven; allow the cheesecake to cool in the oven for an additional 30 minutes.
10. Refrigerate for 8 hours.
11. Remove the sides of the pan and garnish with additional whipped cream, chocolate curls, almonds, and cherries.
